response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, can be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners in commercial and private properties. We specialize in assisting buyers and sellers with all aspects of real estate and financing, aiming to build long-term relationships with our clients. Our team operates across multiple locations in central Florida, including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, and the Lake Nona Region. We are committed to delivering reliable, personalized service to support your real estate journey.
